title: Just Me
full_title: Just Me by Keagan Hoffman (Ft. LEX (JPN))
lyrics:
[Hook: Keagan Hoffman]
Too many fuck shits in the air
Yes, I really swear, I don't really care
I should really focus on myself
I should really focus on myself
Put the blood in the cup I take a little sip
Disgusted by myself, I hate myself
And I just love myself, and I just love myself

[Verse 1: LEX]
?

[Hook: Keagan Hoffman]
Too many fuck shits in the air
Yes, I really swear, I don't really care
I should really focus on myself
I should really focus on myself
Put the blood in the cup I take a little sip
Disgusted by myself, I hate myself
And I just love myself, and I just lovе myself

[Verse 2: Keagan Hoffman]
Traumatized from the past
I don't givе a fuck about all of that
I just got my bands up and I'm make so much racks
Yeah, yeah, I've been making so much racks
All this shit I don't care about
Yeah, I walk to the party with 2 sticks, yeah
2 sticks and I don't give a shit
Got a pistol in my coat, got a AR in my bag
I'm a light this shit up, you want all the smoke

[Hook: Keagan Hoffman]
Too many fuck shits in the air
Yes, I really swear, I don't really care
I should really focus on myself
I should really focus on myself
Put the blood in the cup I take a little sip
Disgusted by myself, I hate myself
And I just love myself, and I just love myself
